mapper.select: SELECT product_name, unit_price, unit_cnt, shipping_included FROM new_product_info
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_product_info ( product_name, unit_price, unit_cnt, platform, shipping_included, start_date, end_date, active ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{unitCnt}, #{platform}, #{shippingIncluded}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{active} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM test_product_info WHERE category_id IS NULL ORDER BY id
SELECT id FROM test_product_info ORDER BY id
